recommendations.title: Sunrise: A Song of Two Humans
recommendations.overview: A married farmer falls under the spell of a slatternly woman from the city, who tries to convince him to drown his wife.

recommendations.title: Faust
recommendations.overview: God and Satan wager on the soul of a learned and prayerful alchemist as part of their eternal war over Earth.

recommendations.title: The Last Laugh
recommendations.overview: An aging doorman, after being fired from his prestigious job at a luxurious hotel, is forced to face the scorn of his friends, neighbours and society.

recommendations.title: City Girl
recommendations.overview: A waitress from Chicago falls in love with a man from rural Minnesota and marries him, with the intent of living a better life - but life on the farm has its own challenges.

recommendations.title: Tabu: A Story of the South Seas
recommendations.overview: On the South Pacific island of Bora Bora, a young couple's love is threatened when the tribal chief declares the girl a sacred virgin.

recommendations.title: Shadow of the Vampire
recommendations.overview: Director F.W. Murnau makes a Faustian pact with a vampire to get him to star in his 1922 film "Nosferatu."

recommendations.title: Nosferatu the Vampyre
recommendations.overview: A real estate agent leaves behind his beautiful wife to go to Transylvania to visit the mysterious Count Dracula and formalize the purchase of a property in Wismar.

recommendations.title: Bram Stoker's Dracula
recommendations.overview: Count Dracula, a 15th-century prince, is condemned to live off the blood of the living for eternity. Young lawyer Jonathan Harker is sent to Dracula's castle to finalise a land deal, but when the Count sees a photo of Harker's fiancée, Mina, the spit

recommendations.title: Dracula
recommendations.overview: A British estate agent travels to Transylvania to meet the mysterious Count Dracula, who is interested in leasing a London castle. After Dracula enslaves the agent and drives him to insanity, the pair return to London together, where Dracula, a secre

recommendations.title: Drácula
